question: What core services does LUCID specialize in?
answer: LUCID specializes in four core areas: Custom Software Development (web, mobile, cloud), Manpower Resource Solutions (IT staffing and dedicated developers), IT Consulting (digital transformation and infrastructure audits), and Digital Solutions (UI/UX design and business intelligence).

question: How quickly can you deploy a dedicated developer team?
answer: We maintain an active, fully-vetted pool of IT specialists. In most cases, we can match and deploy qualified candidates to join your project sprints within 5 to 10 business days.

question: What technologies do your software engineers work with?
answer: Our development team is highly proficient in modern stacks including React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Python, React Native, AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, and enterprise databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

question: What is your typical software development engagement model?
answer: We offer flexible models: Fixed-Price Contracts (best for well-defined, static specifications), Time & Materials (best for evolving project scopes), and Dedicated Team Hire (monthly developer contracts working directly under your management).

question: How do you ensure data security and compliance?
answer: We sign strict Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) with all clients and developers. Our cloud architectures follow industry best practices, enforcing encryptions, firewalls, and access controls compliant with SOC2, GDPR, and ISO standards.

question: Do you provide post-launch maintenance and support?
answer: Yes, we offer ongoing SLA agreements for maintenance, performance monitoring, security patching, and incremental feature updates to keep your systems running at peak performance.

question: How do we communicate with the developers during the project?
answer: Developers communicate directly with you via Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira, and regular Zoom/Google Meet syncs. They adapt completely to your time zone and project sprint schedules.

question: Can I interview the developers before hiring them?
answer: Absolutely. We supply detailed resumes and portfolios, and schedule technical and behavioral video interviews with your engineering leads so you can assess competency and team fit.

question: Do you work with startups, or only enterprise companies?
answer: We work with businesses of all sizes, from funded seed-stage startups looking to build their MVP to established multinational enterprises looking to scale their software capabilities or modernize legacy infrastructure.

question: What happens if a developer is not a good fit for our team?
answer: If there is any performance or integration issue, we offer a 30-day replacement guarantee. We will source and train a replacement developer at no additional resource cost to you to ensure zero project disruption.
